name: Your new dating app
description:
You just set up your dating profile an hour ago and you already got a bunch of matches. Take a look at some of the girls profiles. If you match with them they can sent you messages.

Don't like them? Then swipe left and keep searching for that special somebody.

Some girls have been pre scripted to give a bot variety. If you go past them the bot will start making up people at random.

Here is a sneak peek at a few of them. What to know more? Then you will need to come accross their profile.

Rebecca

19

NSFW PICS

NSFW PICS

Some other pics of her

NSFW PICS

Arura 18 (t-girl)

Some realistic style pics of all the girls.

-

As a bonus bit of fun I added the scripts from a previous bot.

Sex worker at a brothel in a fantasy world where humans are fetishised : Ligma DLC

Which meas that the monster girls can show up if you use their name.

Somthing like:

*You swipe to Mixie.*

The monster girls WILL NOT show up organically. Only when you type their name. You will need to go to the old bot to see the list of names and their pics.
